---
title: 'Taking the Week Off...Egg Head'
date: '2013-05-06T17:38:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6497239600531435485'
blogger_filename: '/2013/05/taking-week-offegg-head.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Vacation'
---

<h4 style="text-align: center;">Taking the Week Off...</h4>I'm taking this week off from a normal post. Because I've spent my time working on another project. Here is a sample of my most recent work on that project so far...<a href="http://eggheadantics.blogspot.com/">http://eggheadantics.blogspot.com/</a><br /><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/brick-wall-31513c5040c9.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/brick-wall-31513c5040c9.png" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/leadership-decisions-19b26c061d1e.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/leadership-decisions-19b26c061d1e.png" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/sales-transfer-no-032124ca8b22.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/sales-transfer-no-032124ca8b22.png" /></a></div><div style="text-align: center;"><br /><br /><div style="text-align: start;"><b>Have questions about anything I said here? Want to share your story? Comment Below!</b></div><div style="text-align: start;"><b><br class="Apple-interchange-newline" />I call you empowered 2 prosper with good success!</b></div><div style="text-align: start;"><b><br /></b><b>N2 Good Success</b><b><span style="font-size: x-small;">Darrell G. Wolfe</span></b></div><div style="text-align: start;">Blog:&nbsp;<a href="http://n2gs.blogspot.com/">http://n2gs.blogspot.com/</a></div><div style="text-align: start;">Facebook:&nbsp;<a href="https://www.facebook.com/n2goodsuccess?sk=wall" target="_blank">https://www.facebook.com/n2goodsuccess</a></div><div style="text-align: start;">Twitter:&nbsp;<a href="http://twitter.com/n2goodsuccess" target="_blank">http://twitter.com/n2goodsuccess</a></div><div style="text-align: start;"><br /></div><div style="text-align: start;"><b style="background-color: white;">See Also:</b></div><div style="text-align: start;">Books by Darrell G. Wolfe:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.amazon.com/Darrell-Wolfe/e/B008F07FO6" style="font-family: verdana, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px;" target="_blank">Amazon.com/author/darrellgwolfe&nbsp;</a></div><div style="text-align: start;">Book Suggestions from the&nbsp;<a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/190-6424964-9305846" target="_blank">N2 Good Success Amazon Store</a></div><div style="text-align: start;">Brand and Product Offerings from&nbsp;<a href="http://www.zazzle.com/n2goodsuccess" target="_blank">N2 Good Success Zazzle Store</a></div><div style="text-align: start;"><br /></div><div style="text-align: start;"><br /></div><div style="text-align: start;"><br /></div><div style="text-align: start;"><br /></div><div style="text-align: start;">___</div><div><br /></div></div>
